creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

06/12/2012 12:05 - Eugene Grosbein wrote:

> 12.06.2012 04:32, cs@FreeBSD.org =D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=88=D0=B5=D1=82:
> > Synopsis: [patch] [maintainer] unbreak port databases/libudbc
> >=20
> > State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> > State-Changed-By: cs
> > State-Changed-When: Mon Jun 11 21:31:28 UTC 2012
> > State-Changed-Why:=20
> > Does not install here as it seems to use compat4x-i386-5.3_9 which has =
known vulnerabilities. Could you please update the entire port.
> >=20
> > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D168943
>=20
> Well, I have not used this port for some years and had no signs of intere=
st in it
> from others.
> UDBC's vendor does not support this closed-source library anymore.
> It depends on vulnerable compat4x and I'm not in position to update they =
both or
> in parts.
>=20
> I request removal of the port.
>=20
> Eugene Grosbein
>=20



Thank you very much for your feedback. I will mark it as broken and good fo=
r removal.



- --
Carlo Strub
Ports committer
- --
